name: Path Equivalence: '//multiple/leading/slash'
description: The product does not properly handle paths with multiple leading slashes ('//path'), which some systems normalize to a single slash while others interpret as UNC or protocol-relative paths, allowing attackers to bypass path-based access controls.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with multiple leading slashes that bypasses CONTROL[path_check] because the check doesn't normalize leading slashes before comparison, while the OS resolves them differently at STORAGE[file_access]
